title: Better Taskbar
body:
# Better Taskbar
![Img](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/358878159615164416/966919116151734312/logo.png)
This mod makes the taskbar better, such as adding progress to the taskbar when loading resources and loading worlds.  
It does not work on OS other than Windows 64-bit.  
If installed on an unsupported OS, it will not cause any problems such as crashes, but this mod will not do anything.

![Image](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/358878159615164416/900506746982907924/d0987df6d1195653647002c12c59cf5b.gif)

Windows 10 　　Windows11  
![Win10](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/358878159615164416/900506761860091954/c0bce3c60b43ecf6fa8081cb441f411e.gif)　　
![Win11](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/358878159615164416/900507099849711636/f3d98ca62de79d9c8f5b2d66d925eccd.gif)
